name: claude-obsidian-vault
description: A disciplined Obsidian-vault framework for knowledge work with Claude — operating-guide kernel, 5-step retrieval cascade, 8 Bases, eval harness, multi-format ingestion, and a portable voice profile. Born from a real working CTO vault; templatised for reuse.

plugins.name: vault-framework
plugins.description: The kernel — CLAUDE.md template, operating-guide kernel (9 universal P-rules), 8 .claude/rules disciplines, /vault-setup path-detecting scaffolder, /hot orientation surface, and /promote workspace→typed-zone ritual.

plugins.name: vault-skills
plugins.description: The active-maintenance skill bundle — kb-curator (audit/lint/refresh-index), plan-builder (HTML session-tracker dashboards), save-conversation (chat → typed vault note with quality filter), autoresearch-loop (Karpathy-style scored optimisation of any text artefact).

plugins.name: vault-eval
plugins.description: The retrieval-eval harness — 33-question template, sub-second smoke test, cross-encoder rerank, faithfulness eval. Falsifiable monthly cadence that turns vault behaviour into a number you can defend.

plugins.name: vault-ingestion
plugins.description: The multi-format ingestion pipeline — PDF / DOCX / PPTX / XLSX / HTML / MD / TXT / image → typed .md note with purpose.md classifier, frontmatter contract, original preserved, three-tier dedup (binary SHA / text-hash / semantic warn).

plugins.name: vault-voice
plugins.description: The personal-voice layer — voice-profile.md template, voice-discipline auto-load rule, populate-voice-profile.py extractor that turns a corpus of authored prose into a calibrated style guide. Any draft Claude writes under your name gets it right.
